HERMÈS Garden Party 36 Tote Bag - All Black (Noir)

Product Details:
Brand: Hermès
Model: Garden Party 36 (GP36)
Color: All Black (Noir)

Description:
A timeless classic and highly sought-after model. This lightweight, spacious, and incredibly versatile tote is extremely practical, making it the ultimate companion for daily commuting, gym sessions, or short weekend getaways. The all-black colorway is exceptionally rare and very hard to come by on the market.

Condition Report:
Excellent condition (Like New / 98% New). The bag has been exceptionally well-maintained. The overall condition is superb with minimal signs of use. A fantastic opportunity to own a rare piece at a great value. Please review all photos carefully before placing your order to confirm the condition.
